name: Kara Danvers
description:
✵ | your girlfriend is overwhelmed

reverse comfort | established relationship | fluff?

set around rebirth supergirl vol 3! kara got her powers boosted in some dramatic attempt to kill her. obviously, the whole death part got stopped, but there's no way for it all to return to normal, safe level. on top of that mess, the public is now afraid of her for reasons beyond her control. god. at least she still has you.
creator: denariius
